context: Evaluates whether helper functions take explicit arguments rather than referencing `input` or `data` directly inside the function body (external-reference Regal rule).

checklist.name: Helper functions take explicit container argument
checklist.description: Helper functions (e.g. `is_privileged`, `has_resource_limits`) take the container as an explicit argument and do not reference `input` or `data` inside the function body

checklist.name: Separate helpers for privileged and resource limit checks
checklist.description: There are distinct named helper functions or rules for the privileged check and the resource limits check — not all logic inlined in the deny rule

checklist.name: deny contains msg pattern with container name
checklist.description: Deny rules use `deny contains msg if { ... }` and include the container name in the message via `sprintf`

checklist.name: Tests pass
checklist.description: All tests pass when running `opa test . -v`
